explanations.1: @echo off turns off the display of commands as they run, so you only see the output, not the command itself.
explanations.3: cls clears the screen to give you a fresh, empty console window.
explanations.5: This runs a Docker container with openssl to encrypt your secrets.md file using AES-256 encryption; the -v flag mounts your current folder into the container, and -w sets the working directory inside the container.
explanations.8: IF EXIST checks whether the file secrets.encrypted was successfully created before attempting to delete the original.
